Notes: The zone starts with x.campus.edu. A 192.0.2.10 present so the UPDATE can legally add the identical RR and later delete it within the same message. RFC 2136 describes the update list as a sequence of changes but does not specify whether servers must apply them strictly sequentially, normalize contradictory operations, or reject them.

Steps.Description: Add the exact same RR that already exists, then delete the exact same RR in the same UPDATE with no prerequisites.

Steps.Name: x.campus.edu.
Steps.Description: Observe whether the RR remains present after the UPDATE.
